title: BEM-840 read 839 next fix
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
b839=load('governance/state/bem839_verify_after_response_retry_tick.json')
missing=b839.get('missing',[])
if not missing:
    status='triad_present_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response into agreed protocol'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing and 'workflow_dispatch_results' not in missing and 'claude_runtime_state' not in missing:
    # Make the next action explicit for Claude: produce real response file, not blocker.
    request=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem840_real_response_required.md')
    request.write_text('# BEM-840 | REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: dispatch/runtime proof exists but real response is still missing. Write a real response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem840_claude_response.md.'+sep+sep+'Required content:'+sep+'Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED'+sep+'Subject: multi-agent architecture strategy and further development protocol.'+sep+'Do not write NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL. Do not write issue comments. Do not expose secrets.'+sep)
    status='real_response_request_written'
    next_action='dispatch Claude workflow again and verify real response file'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    status='runtime_state_missing_fix_runtime_writer'
    next_action='patch Claude dispatcher to write runtime state before Claude action and after completion'
elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    status='dispatch_results_missing_fix_queue_processor'
    next_action='fix workflow dispatch result writer before touching Claude response'
else:
    status='unknown_missing_state'
    next_action='re-run triad verification'
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'b839_status':b839.get('status'),'missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_read_839_and_apply_next_fix.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_read_839_and_apply_next_fix.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Read BEM-839 And Apply Next Fix | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Missing: '+', '.join(missing)+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem840_read_839_and_apply_next_fix.json','governance/reports/bem840_read_839_and_apply_next_fix.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if status=='real_response_request_written': changed.append('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem840_real_response_required.md')
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Read BEM-839 proof state and applied the next concrete fix: response request, runtime writer repair, or dispatch result repair')
